optout.notes: Non-profit operated by Free Law Project. scan.reason: Insurance claims history database. No public search. Consumers can request their own CLUE report (Comprehensive Loss Underwriting Exchange).

LexisNexis Information Suppression Request form. Suppresses data from non-FCRA products.

optout.notes: CLUE (Comprehensive Loss Underwriting Exchange) is a claims history database used by insurance companies. FCRA-regulated for insurance reports.
